trivia_bullets.text: Goblin Arsonist was originally printed in Rise of the Eldrazi (April 2010) — a large set notable for departing from normal Zendikar mechanics to focus entirely on Eldrazi creatures. The Arsonist has been reprinted six times: Rise of the Eldrazi (2010), Magic 2012 (2011), Magic 2013 (2012), Duel Decks: Sorin vs. Tibalt (2013), Core Set 2021 (2020), and Foundations Jumpstart (2024). All six printings carry the same Wayne Reynolds art. [Scryfall: prints_search_uri]

Artist Wayne Reynolds is known in MTG art collecting circles for high-value originals: his Feather, the Redeemed painting sold for $6,050 in 2019, and his Bruenor Battlehammer (Adventures in the Forgotten Realms) painting sold for $26,000 in 2021. [Hipsters of the Coast: 'Painting for Bruenor Battlehammer by Wayne Reynolds Sells for $26,000'; 'Art for Feather, the Redeemed by Wayne Reynolds Sells for $6,050']

"With great power comes great risk of getting yourself killed." [Scryfall] No attributed speaker. The text riffs on the Spider-Man axiom ('with great power comes great responsibility') and inverts it into goblin-idiom: goblins in MTG lore are defined by their self-destructive relationship with fire and power. The Arsonist's death-trigger mechanically literalizes this — it takes you with it.

EDHREC rank 12,293 [Scryfall: edhrec_rank]. A 1/1 for {R} with a death-trigger dealing 1 damage to any target. Legal in Pauper, Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Vintage, Commander, and PreDH. Sees competitive Pauper play in Mono-Red Burn and Goblins archetypes as a 1-drop that generates value on death. [Scryfall: legalities; MTGDecks.net: goblin-arsonist]

related_cards.name: Goblin Grenade
related_cards.note: The canonical goblin self-sacrifice burn spell; Arsonist's death-ping is the creature-based parallel

related_cards.name: Goblin Lackey
related_cards.note: Pauper/Legacy Goblins engine that Arsonist appears alongside in goblin aggro lists

related_cards.name: Mogg Fanatic
related_cards.note: Direct mechanical predecessor — 1-drop goblin with a sacrifice-to-deal-1-damage ability; Arsonist is the death-trigger version

related_cards.name: Skirk Prospector
related_cards.note: Pauper Goblins combo piece; appears in the same Pauper Goblins lists as Arsonist
